axioms: User wants a complete and exhaustive analysis of their DNA file
Must cover health, diet, fitness, and psychology

lateral_prism.Track_A_Clinical: Analyse disease risk, methylation, heart health, and pharmacogenomics
lateral_prism.Track_B_Optimization: Analyse diet, metabolism, vitamins, and physical fitness markers
lateral_prism.Track_C_Behavioral: Analyse neurotransmitters, addiction risk, and cognitive baselines

plan: Write a python script with a massive dictionary of SNPs. Run it on the DNA file. Synthesize into a giant report.
review: Checked for accuracy: ensuring standard 23andMe/Ancestry rsID mappings are used. Will note if SNPs are missing.
